strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Active AI-agent infrastructure work at current role including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, directly relevant to the AI focus
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform, 2016–present), showing builder mindset and initiative
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; formal education tops out at a BS in Computer Science
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, executive customer advisory, or large-scale AI platform ownership at the scope the role requires
AI experience is recent and implementation-level; lacks published research, widely recognized AI products, or the thought-leadership profile expected at this seniority
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, versatile engineer with genuine recent exposure to AI-agent tooling, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level individual contributor position requiring recognized AI thought leadership, a track record of advising strategic customers on cloud and AI adoption, and demonstrated influence over product direction at scale — none of which are evident in this resume. The distance between 'Staff Software Engineer building agentic infrastructure' and 'Principal IC shaping AI strategy for enterprise customers' is substantial, and nothing in the resume bridges that gap.
